recommendations.title: Recommendation with extremely long title and description that tests the maximum character limits and display capabilities of the recommendation system to ensure it handles edge cases properly
recommendations.reason: This is an extremely long reason that goes on and on to test character limits
recommendations.description: This is an extremely long description that goes on and on to test how the system handles very lengthy text content. It includes multiple sentences and continues to provide excessive detail to ensure the display can handle edge cases with maximum character limits and very long recommendation descriptions that might cause layout issues or text overflow problems in the user interface.
